name: com.rockrabbit.claude-unity-bootstrap
description: One-stop installer that wires a Unity project to Claude Code. Verifies prerequisites (Python 3.10+, uvx), installs the CoplayDev unity-mcp bridge, generates .mcp.json, scaffolds Assets/_Prompts/, appends a CLAUDE.md asset-workflow section, and exposes a Prompt Runner that drives _Prompts/*.md through Unity AI Assistant in Agent mode.
